variant_name: 高父 — 满月宴上的释然护家者
trigger: 昭昭满月宴上，陆姝仪当众坦白重生与设计真相，高父在家宴场合见证女儿多年冤屈被洗清。

appearance_delta.face: 仍有多年忧思留下的皱纹，但神情较此前更沉定，压抑中出现迟来的释然
appearance_delta.body: 姿态恢复士大夫家主的稳重，不再是危机中的仓皇状态
appearance_delta.hair: 束冠整齐，宴席场合比日常更规整
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 从单纯担忧女儿，转为作为长辈守住女儿与外孙女名声的沉稳见证者

costume_override.outfit: 适合家宴待客的整洁文士礼服或规整长衫，保留文官背景的素雅端正

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese middle-aged scholar father at a traditional full-month banquet, slim and dignified, lined but composed face with a trace of relief after long worry, black-and-gray hair neatly crowned, wearing a refined dark blue-gray robe suitable for hosting a family celebration, standing in a decorated banquet hall with red drapery and infant celebration elements, calm, protective, and honorable father-grandfather presence, realistic historical Chinese drama aesthetic
visual_prompt_negative: flashy gold armor, exaggerated smile, youthful face, modern banquet hall, glasses, long beard, neon colors, fantasy ornaments
emotional_tone: 沉稳、释然、护住家人与真相后的安定
